articles.title: Oracle layoff post by one of the employees is going viral; reveals claims of algorithm-driven cuts after 30-year tenure
articles.description: A former Oracle employee’s viral post claims layoffs may be driven by algorithms targeting senior roles, sparking debate on transparency and decision-making after the company’s large-scale job cuts.

articles.title: NITI Aayog targets MSME and agriculture growth with new DPI 2.0 framework
articles.description: The DPI 2.0 scope consists of eight sectoral transformations, recommended based on their potential to remove structural bottlenecks constraining the growth of the lower- and middle-income groups, says the report, titled 'DPI@2047 for Viksit Bharat'.

articles.description: Jajpur: Police have arrested five persons, including three minors, for allegedly assaulting two youths at gunpoint and robbing them of cameras and mobile

articles.title: Ganjam launches free auto-ambulance service to ferry pregnant women
articles.description: Ganjam district has launched 'Nirikhyana Sathi', a free auto-ambulance service for pregnant women and infants from remote areas to health centers. This initiative, funded by Red Cross, aims to ensure safe institutional deliveries and reduce maternal and infant mortality. Expectant mothers and ASHA workers can book these services via WhatsApp, with 100 auto-rickshaws identified for the purpose across 12 blocks.

articles.title: From Black Holes To Heat Death: 5 Mind-Bending Cosmic Phenomena That Scientists Still Can’t Explain
articles.description: Cosmic threats including black holes, dark matter, the Great Attractor, gamma ray bursts, and vacuum decay, highlighting unknowns and potential universe ending risks

articles.title: IRCTC tour package from Delhi: Railways to operate Bharat Gaurav Deluxe AC Tourist train for Bhutan
articles.description: IRCTC to run Bharat Gaurav Deluxe AC Tourist train for Bhutan tour in 2026. Check itinerary, cost, route, and booking details.

articles.title: Pakistani missile strikes hit eastern Afghanistan: Three killed, dozens injured, university damaged
articles.description: The strikes reportedly targeted areas in and around Asadabad, the provincial capital of Kunar. Among the locations damaged was the Faculty of Education at Syed Jamaluddin Afghan University.

articles.title: India-NZ FTA: GJEPC eyes 200 pc export growth to USD 50 mn in 3 years
articles.description: India-NZ FTA: GJEPC eyes 200 pc export growth to USD 50 mn in 3 years

articles.title: Shakira crew member dies after crushing injuries during Brazil show setup
Maharashtra MSBSHSE HSC result 2026 within this week, says official amid protest concerns
articles.description: Maharashtra State Board officials have assured that the MSBSHSE HSC results will be announced within the week, dismissing concerns about delays due to employee protests. Authorities confirmed that result preparation and verification are progressing on schedule. Anxiety had risen among students following media reports of disruptions, but the board reiterated there would be no impact. Results will be available online and via DigiLocker, with uploads already in the final stage of completion.

articles.title: Assam HS Class 12th result 2026 to be released tomorrow: Here's how you can download scorecards from DigiLocker
articles.description: Assam will declare its Class 12 (HS) results on April 28, 2026, Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma confirmed, ending confusion triggered by a fake notice. Over 3.3 lakh students await scores from exams held between February and March. Results will be available on official portals and via DigiLocker for easy digital access.

articles.title: Hormuz shut, US blockade failing: Trump's Iran gamble causes chaos, oil prices surge to...| IRGC
articles.description: Donald Trump’s cancelled talks with Iran, the U.S. blockade in the Strait of Hormuz, and failed “maximum pressure” tactics have triggered one of the worst energy crises in modern history. Oil prices are now nearly 48% higher than February. This crisis is hitting ordinary people, fueling inflation, and exposing the limits of U.S. power in the Persian Gulf. Chevron CEO Mike Wirth warns the global energy system has lost its “flexibility”, while the head of the International Energy Agency, Fatih Birol, says today’s crisis is even worse than the legendary oil shocks of 1973, 1979, and 2022 combined.

articles.title: Why Elon Musk Is Seeking $134 Billion From Sam Altman’s OpenAI: Key Allegations Explained
articles.description: Elon Musk vs Sam Altman Trial Begins Today: Musk is suing OpenAI for betraying its founding mission of developing AI for benefit of humanity

articles.title: Watch: US–Iran talks stall as new Hormuz proposal raises stakes
articles.description: Talks between the United States and Iran have entered a new phase of uncertainty after planned negotiations in Islamabad failed to take place. According to reports, Iran has now floated a proposal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and end the war first, while delaying nuclear negotiations. The move puts Washington in a dilemma, balancing de-escalation with pressure over Iran’s nuclear programme. #USIranTensions #StraitOfHormuz #Geopolitics

articles.title: CBSE Class 12th Result 2026 Live Updates: What is CBSE’s OSM evaluation?
articles.description: CBSE Board Class 12th Result 2026 Date Live Updates: CBSE Class 12 exams this year were held from February 17 to April 10, 2026, ending with the Legal Studies exam. All the papers were conducted in a single shift starting at 10:30 am. Once released, candidates will be able to check results at cbse.gov.in, and results.cbse.nic.in.

articles.title: AAP vs Chadha Fallout: 'Core Leaders Felt Marginalised', Says Vikramjit Sahney - EXCLUSIVE
articles.description: Rajya Sabha MP Vikramjit Singh Sahney explains AAP split, cites sidelining of leaders like Raghav Chadha, in an exclusive interview with Times Now.

articles.title: “Bound To Happen”: Congress MLA’s Take On Trump Event Shooting
articles.description: Congress leader Vijay Wadettiwar has stirred a political controversy with his comments on an attack involving US President Donald Trump, made during a public event in Nagpur, Maharashtra. Referring to the incident, he used the phrase “Jaisi karni waisi bharni,” implying that actions lead to consequences. Wadettiwar further alleged that Trump had disturbed multiple countries while in power and claimed that his policies caused damage to the United States. He also drew a parallel with India, saying there is a perception among people that the country is heading on a similar path of decline. His remarks have drawn strong reactions from political circles, with criticism over the tone and content of his statement.

articles.title: Aamir Khan Gets Emotional At Son Junaid’s Ek Din Event, Heartwarming Family Moment Goes Viral
articles.description: Aamir Khan was seen getting emotional at Ek Din Ki Mehfil, a special musical event for his son Junaid Khan’s upcoming film Ek Din. Seated beside Sai Pallavi, Aamir wiped away tears in a rare, heartfelt moment. The evening also turned into a warm family outing with Azad Rao Khan and Gauri Spratt. From a proud father’s reaction to a blended family coming together, here’s why this emotional moment is winning hearts online.

articles.title: Suspended Haryana Congress MLA breaks ranks, backs BJP govt on women’s quota
articles.description: Defying the Congress boycott, the Ratia legislator attended the special assembly session to criticise his own party leadership and support the Nayab Singh Saini-led BJP government’s resolution.

articles.title: OpenAI Working On AI Agents-Powered Smartphone: Report
articles.description: The new smartphone will be powered primarily by AI agents instead of traditional apps.

articles.title: India’s banking system turns sluggish amid loan recovery delays and legal hurdles: CII report
articles.description: India's banking sector needs urgent reforms. The Confederation of Indian Industry's report highlights slow loan recovery and complex laws. Reforms aim to speed up legal processes and improve efficiency. Stricter timelines and stronger institutions are recommended. Simplifying laws under a unified code is also proposed. These changes will strengthen financial discipline and boost investor confidence.

articles.title: Accumulate Mahindra and Mahindra Financial Services; target of Rs 325: Prabhudas Lilladher
articles.description: Prabhudas Lilladher recommended accumulate rating on Mahindra and Mahindra Financial Services with a target price of Rs 325 in its research report dated April 25, 2026.

articles.title: Kerala’s first Navy-assisted heart transplant recipient Mathew Achadan passes away
articles.description: Mathew Achadan, the Kerala autorickshaw driver whose life was saved in a landmark 2015 Indian Navy donor heart airlift to Kochi, has died at 57.

articles.description: According to the official schedule, the TSRJC CET 2026 will be conducted on Sunday, May 3, 2026. The examination will be held in a single shift from 10:00 AM to 12:30 PM, lasting two and a half hours.

articles.title: CISF jawan injured in firing outside BJP candidate's residence; Election Commission seeks report
articles.description: A Central Industrial Security Force jawan was injured in a firing incident outside the residence of BJP candidate Pawan Singh in West Bengal's North 24 Parganas district. The incident occurred late Sunday night ahead of the second phase of polling.

articles.title: 3 Years Later, Rinku Singh Responds To Sehwag's Challenge, Proves Him Wrong
articles.description: In a recent match against Lucknow, Rinku scored an unbeaten 83 off 51 balls, including four consecutive sixes in the final over, leading Kolkata Knight Riders to a total of 155 for 7.

articles.title: Naagin 7 to go off air soon; Ekta Kapoor confirms finale episode date
articles.description: Producer Ekta Kapoor has confirmed that Naagin 7 will conclude its run on June 7, coinciding with her birthday. Initially planned for 30 episodes, the season was extended due to channel requests and will now have over 48 episodes. Kapoor stated that shorter seasons are planned for future installments to ensure the show's annual return.

articles.title: East Austin Shooting: Two injured outside Sam’s BBQ as police hunt for suspect - What we know so far
articles.description: A shooting outside Sam's BBQ in East Austin left two people injured. The incident occurred late Sunday night near Chicon and Alamo streets. Police responded swiftly and are searching for the suspect who fled the scene. Both victims were hospitalized. Authorities state there is no immediate threat to the public. The investigation is ongoing.

articles.title: NIA begins probe on suspected terror angle in Bengal crude bomb recovery case
articles.description: The state police recovered 79 round-shaped objects suspected to be crude bombs, tied with jute ropes, along with other incriminating materials from South 24 Parganas district on April 25.

articles.title: ‘I wasn’t worried’: Trump downplays White House Correspondents' Dinner shooting, pushes to reschedule gala within 30 days
articles.description: US President Trump expressed no worry following a shooting at the White House Correspondents' Dinner, praising security's swift action and advocating for the event's continuation. He clashed with an interviewer over the attacker's manifesto, attributing the incident to a "sick guy" and broader political "hate speech."

articles.title: Parking norms for star hotels near airport may be slashed by 50%
articles.description: As per BMC’s proposal, concessions on parking norms would be applicable for star-category hotels, subject to the condition that full parking requirements under regulation 44 would apply if the building’s use changes in future

articles.title: US-Pakistan tango: This risky double-game may dent Islamabad’s relations with Beijing, and also cause international humiliation
articles.description: Iran's foreign minister refused to meet a US delegation in Pakistan, exposing Islamabad's risky diplomatic tightrope walk. This move, allegedly influenced by Pakistan's army chief, highlights regional power plays and potential friction with China. The article suggests the US seeks a face-saving victory amid geopolitical tensions with Iran.

articles.title: Polluting tag on over 50% industries in MMR
articles.description: The environment department, which is already working on stringent measures against highly polluting industries, will impose higher penalties to address the situation, officials said

articles.title: 'I just want to go home': Visibly-shaken Erika Kirk breaks down during WHCD evacuation - Watch Viral Video
articles.description: Panic erupted at the White House Correspondents' Dinner when an armed man opened fire, forcing an evacuation. A viral video shows Erika Kirk, visibly distraught, pleading to go home, her reaction amplified by the recent loss of her husband to gun violence. The suspect, identified as Cole Allen, faces federal charges after allegedly shooting a Secret Service agent.

articles.title: Work begins on ₹423 crore integrated GB Pant campus in Okhla
articles.description: The government will establish an integrated GB Pant engineering college campus in Okhla, with completion expected by December 2028 at ₹423.6 crore.

articles.title: Who is Lexie Brown? All about the woman linked to Klay Thompson as Megan Thee Stallion accuses him of betrayal
articles.description: Megan Thee Stallion and Klay Thompson’s year old high profile relationship has come to a dramatic end after she accused him of cheating on her, sparking chaos. While Klay Thompson has remained silent about the cheating rumors and their break up, he has been linked to a woman named Lexie Brown.

articles.title: Fact check: Did Klay Thompson actually say “Never getting into another relationship again” amid rumors of Megan Thee Stallion cheating on him?
articles.description: Megan Thee Stallion and the Dallas Mavericks’ star player, Klay Thompson, had inspired billions with their love, only for her to accuse him of allegedly cheating on her, sparking chaos. Megan Thee Stallion has now confirmed that she has ended things with Klay Thompson after she found him cheating on her. Amid this, there are claims of her cheating on him.

articles.title: Jaleel asks Fadnavis to resign over failing law and order in state
articles.description: AIMIM's Imtiaz Jaleel slammed the Maharashtra govt and CM Fadnavis for failing to maintain law and order. He said if the Home Minister can't ensure safety, he should resign, and if police can't keep peace, they should "sit at home".

articles.title: Magnitude 6.1 Earthquake Hits Japan's Hokkaido Region, No Tsunami
articles.description: A 6.1 magnitude quake hits Japan's Hokkaido region, with a seismic intensity of '5+'. No tsunami warning was issued or major damage reported. This comes days after a 7.5 magnitude quake in northern Japan that triggered a tsunami warning.

articles.title: “They are deeply connected”: Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini’s drama takes a new turn amid claims of unresolved emotions between them
articles.description: Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini remain the talk of the town even as they try to disappear from the public eye amid their alleged affair rumors, sparking outrage among millions. As Mike Vrabel seeks some time off to be with his family as he faces a difficult time in his personal life, Dianna Russini has deleted her account on X.

articles.title: AAP wiped out in Rajya Sabha: BJP's Shahnawaz Hussain on defections
articles.description: BJP leader Shahnawaz Hussain claims AAP is 'wiped out' in the Rajya Sabha after its MPs defected. This comes as AAP's Sanjay Singh petitioned the Rajya Sabha Chairman to disqualify 7 MPs who joined BJP, challenging the merger's legality.

articles.title: MP CM Mohan Yadav praises PM Modi's 'Mann Ki Baat' for awareness
articles.description: MP CM Mohan Yadav lauded PM Modi's 'Mann Ki Baat' for raising awareness. In the latest episode, the PM celebrated India's wind energy capacity crossing 56 GW, a milestone that positions the country fourth globally in wind power generation.

articles.title: IRS officer's daughter murder: Police recover victim's, stolen phones
articles.description: Accused Rahul Meena led Delhi Police to recover two mobile phones, including the victim's, in the IRS officer's daughter murder case. He is in police custody as investigators await a DNA profiling report, which is expected within 15 days.
